description: Routing-accuracy benchmark. Each prompt is a REALISTIC, paraphrased user request (not a verbatim trigger phrase from any SKILL.md) with the skill it should route to. The harness (tests/verify_routing.py) runs every prompt through the TRIGGERS regex list in hooks/check-skills.sh and asserts the expected skill is the primary skill of at least one matched trigger. Ported in spirit from product-factory-os benchmarks/prompts.json (which classifies product type); adapted to skill routing, the canon's actual deterministic classifier. expectedSkill must be a real skill slug under skills/.

prompts.text: Хочу собрать новое приложение с нуля под учёт абонементов
